title: Takiuru
signIn: Takiuru ki te tīmata i tō huitanga
forgotPasswordInstructions: Tāuruhia te wāhitau īmēra e whakamahia ana e koe ki te takiuru ki tō pūkete
forgotPasswordSendEmail: Ka tukuna e mātou he īmēra me ngā tohutohu ki te kōwhiri i tētahi kupuhipa hou.
twoFactorInstructions: Whakamahia tō kaiwhakamana kua tautuhia ki te tiki i tētahi waehere ā tāuruhia ki konei.
enterCodeFromAuthenticator: Tāuruhia te Waehere mai i te Whakamana
emailVerificationInstructions: Tāuruhia te waehere haumaru i tukuna ki tō īmēra.
alreadyHaveAccount: Kei a koe kē he pūkete?
welcomeBack: Nau mai hoki ki tō mātou Hapori Tipu
processingLogin: E Mahi ana i ngā Mōhiohio Takiuru
processingSignup: E Mahi ana i ngā Mōhiohio Hainatia
processingInformation: E Mahi ana i ngā Mōhiohio
invalidCode: He waehere kē, tāuruhia te waehere tika.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: Kua whakamana te whakamana rua-āhuatanga mō tēnei pūkete. Tāuruhia tō waehere whakamana ki te whakaoti i te takiuru.
oauth.noLinkedAccount: Kāore he pūkete honona i kitea mō {name}. Tāuruhia ō tohu takiuru o mua ki te hono, i te waihanga rānei i tētahi pūkete hou.
oauth.verifyEmailSent: Kua tukuna he waehere whakamana ki tō īmēra.
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Tāuruhia te īmēra me te kupuhipa

sudo.redirecting: Kua takiuru hei kiritaki, e arahina ana ki te kāinga.
